overall.description: A first-person driving sequence through a desert highway in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring clear skies, sparse desert vegetation, and passing under an overhead gantry before approaching a roadside motel sign. The footage showcases high-quality game engine rendering with cinematic lighting and a warm color palette.

distant mountain range visible on the horizon
tall electrical transmission tower visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway with clear blue skies, approaching a large overhead gantry structure. The camera drives steadily forward, passing under the metal gantry at around 12 seconds, with guardrails lining the left side and sparse desert vegetation visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with distant roadside structures

agents.ego_description: cruising along the open highway with the gantry passed, approaching a distant motel sign on the right

group of dark trash bins on the right roadside

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the open desert highway after passing the gantry, the road stretches ahead with power lines visible on the right. The Los Padres motel sign gradually becomes visible in the distance, and trash bins appear on the right roadside as the camera approaches.

events.description: passing the Los Padres motel sign and adjacent roadside structure

agents.ego_description: driving past the neon motel sign and small roadside structure, continuing down the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes the prominent Los Padres motel sign with its neon lettering and 'NO VACANCY' display. A small roadside structure with green neon lighting is visible on the right as the camera drives past, continuing along the desert highway toward the distant horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive along a desert highway that transitions from an open road under a massive structure to a roadside stop. It begins by steadily approaching a large metal overhead gantry, passing beneath it while guardrails and sparse desert vegetation line the path. As the camera continues forward, the landscape opens up to reveal power lines on the right and the distant silhouette of a motel sign. The scene then shifts as the camera draws closer to the Los Padres motel, passing its neon lettering and no vacancy display alongside a small structure glowing with green light. Finally, the camera glides past these roadside markers, continuing its trajectory toward the far horizon under a clear blue sky.
